_comment: In-repo SideStore source. The Action (../.github/workflows/build-sources.yml) runs generate.py on a schedule, reads THIS repo's latest release, and commits the refreshed apps-visionos.json next to this file. This port is Apple Vision Pro only, so only the visionOS source carries an app; apps-ios.json is generated empty.

ios.name: sm64coopdx — iPhone & iPad
ios.subtitle: Super Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe
ios.description: Placeholder iOS source. This port is Apple Vision Pro only — use the visionOS source.

visionos.name: sm64coopdx — Apple Vision Pro
visionos.subtitle: Super Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe in 2D and stereoscopic 3D
visionos.description: Super Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe on Apple Vision Pro — online co-op and a world-locked stereoscopic 3D mode. Bring your own ROM.

apps.name: Super Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe
apps.subtitle: Super Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe for Apple Vision Pro
apps.localizedDescription: Super Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe on Apple Vision Pro: the full game rendered natively on Metal, online co-op over CoopNet, and a world-locked stereoscopic 3D mode with live-tunable screen size, distance, depth, and focus. Ships with no game content; you supply your own Super Mario 64 (US) ROM.
